creator: benoit@guillemaud.fr
text:
Hello,

I'm currently running Sonarr 4.0.0.748_1, installed from ports into a FreeBSD jail.

I've taken a look to other tickets regarding this port, and it seems the patch to 4.0.1.929 was commited a week ago, but I still can find it by doing `pkg update && pkh upgrade`. Pkg is set to 

Is the patch from ticket 276536 not generally available yet ?
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=276536

Best regards
